description: Golden set — 45 deterministic regression cases across role_guard (10), redact (10), assigned_service_tasks (10), conversation_history (5), prompt_contract (9), output_contract (1). v8 adds answer/check/service routing contracts for commercial intake quality.

cases.description: 游客调任何工具 → permission_denied（guest 白名单为空）
游客调客户工具（get_customer_devices）也被拒
客户越权调 get_engineer_profile → 拒
客户越权调 get_pending_tickets_for_engineer → 拒
工程师越权调客户设备工具 → 拒
工程师越权调客户设备详情 → 拒
客户调 get_customer_devices（允许）→ ok
工程师调 get_engineer_profile（允许）→ ok
工程师调 get_pending_tickets_for_engineer（允许）→ ok
未知角色名字符串 → 拒（ROLE_ALLOWED_TOOLS 无该键 → fallback guest 白名单）
手机号脱敏

input.text: 我的电话 13812345678 有问题找我

expect.output: 我的电话 [手机号] 有问题找我

cases.description: 身份证脱敏
邮箱脱敏
车牌脱敏

input.text: 车牌号苏E12345 停在门口

expect.output: 车牌号[车牌] 停在门口

cases.description: 带凭据的 URL 脱敏（email 不吃 @ 右侧）
技术内容不误伤：设备型号

input.text: 大族 G3015H 激光切割机挂渣

expect.output: 大族 G3015H 激光切割机挂渣

cases.description: 技术内容不误伤：功率与材料
技术内容不误伤：工单号
长条码（13位）不误伤为银行卡（无标签上下文）
混合 PII + 技术内容：PII 脱 + 技术保留
单专长（激光切割机）→ 返回已派给我的服务任务并保留 filter_applied=true
多专长（激光+折弯）→ 不再按专长过滤全量 pending，只返回已派任务
空专长数组 → filter_applied=false，但仍只返回已派服务任务
specialties JSON 脏数据 → 容错为空专长 + 不抛错
specialties 含非字符串脏值 → 只保留字符串
已派任务查询 limit 超过 20 → clip 到 20
已派任务查询 limit 未传 → 默认 10
专长与设备类型不匹配 → 仍返回已派任务，不因专长过滤掉
engineerId 缺失 → specialties 为空，且不暴露全量 pending 队列
engineer 记录不存在 → 不崩，且不暴露全量 pending 队列
[missing_info] 跟进：客户端拉到上次未提供材料牌号的对话 → open_pending_items 聚合出该项

summary.summary_text: 客户咨询 3000W 光纤切碳钢挂渣，未提供材料牌号
pending_items: [missing_info] 客户未提供材料牌号（Q235 vs Q345）

cases.description: [awaiting_confirmation] 跟进：客户端拉到上次 AI 给过参数建议未确认 → 聚合出待确认项

summary.summary_text: AI 建议将氧气压力从 0.6 上调到 0.8MPa 等待客户确认是否执行
pending_items: [awaiting_confirmation] AI 建议调整氧气压力至 0.8MPa 但未确认执行

cases.description: [followup_due] 跟进：合伙人端拉到上次推荐了工程师但客户未回复 → 聚合出 followup_due

summary.summary_text: 推荐了张工程师给苏州客户，客户未回复是否接受
pending_items: [followup_due] 推荐了张工程师但客户未回复

cases.description: [service_followup] 跟进：内部工程师端拉到服务运营待跟进事项 → 聚合出 service_followup

summary.summary_text: 客户要求确认备件到货时间，SAGEMRO 运营需继续跟进
pending_items: [service_followup] 客户备件到货时间需 SAGEMRO 运营继续跟进

cases.description: [rating_pending] 跟进：客户端拉到有已解决待评价的工单 → 聚合出 rating_pending

summary.summary_text: WO-20260417-001 已由李工程师完成维修，待客户评价

cases.description: 中国站英文报警代码也必须默认简体中文

input.message: My fiber laser cutter shows alarm E012. What should I check first?

prompt_contains: You MUST answer this turn in Simplified Chinese
Market: China edition / sagemro.cn
English alarm codes, brand names, CNC terms, or short English phrases do not count as a request to answer in English
prompt_not_contains: You MUST answer this turn in English

cases.description: 国际站客户聊天跟随客户语言且系统信息保持英文

input.message: My fiber laser cutter shows alarm E012. What should I check first?

prompt_contains: Market: International edition / sagemro.com
Reply in the same natural language the customer uses in their latest message
If the latest customer message is ambiguous, mostly alarm codes, brand names, model names, CNC terms, or short technical fragments, default to English
SAGEMRO system UI labels, button names, routes, account type names, and portal names remain in English
Internal service-ready summaries, work-order summaries, progress text, and AI analysis must remain in English
prompt_not_contains: You MUST answer this turn in English

cases.description: 简单知识问题答清即可，不强推工单

input.message: What does a laser cutting nozzle do?

prompt_contains: Do not push a work order or service request after a simple question is already answered clearly
Add a short SAGEMRO service follow-up offer only when manual confirmation, quotation, parts, service scheduling, safety handling, or reviewed parameter verification is clearly useful
If the user did not explicitly request a detailed plan, table, report, or full checklist, write exactly 5 compact lines

cases.description: 普通维护知识问题先完整解答，不默认转工单

input.message: How often should I clean the protective lens on a fiber laser cutter?

prompt_contains: Simple knowledge or routine maintenance questions: answer the question first, then stop unless the user signals service intent
Do not turn every useful answer into a ticket path

cases.description: 停机和安全风险需要推进 SAGEMRO 服务跟进摘要

input.message: Our 6kW laser cutter is down, smells burnt in the electrical cabinet, and production has stopped. Can you send someone?

prompt_contains: Service conversion triggers: production-stopping faults, safety risks, formal quotation, parts confirmation, on-site service, remote diagnosis, new machine selection, or explicit service request
For urgent or unsafe equipment issues, prioritize stop-work safety guidance, risk level, missing facts, and a SAGEMRO service follow-up summary

cases.description: 报价和配件问题不编造价格，转为正式确认路径

input.message: 帮我估一下这台激光机更换喷嘴和保护镜多少钱，能不能安排上门？

prompt_contains: For price, parts, or on-site requests, do not invent final prices, availability, service dates, or engineer assignments
When conversion is appropriate, present a concise service-ready case summary and ask the user to confirm the next step; do not claim a work order exists until it is actually created

cases.description: 普通维护频率问题要短答且不主动加服务 CTA

input.message: 激光切割机喷嘴多久清理一次？

prompt_contains: For routine maintenance frequency questions, answer in no more than 5 compact lines
Do not add a SAGEMRO service follow-up CTA for routine maintenance questions unless the user mentions abnormal wear, downtime, safety risk, quotation, parts purchase, or on-site support
Do not invent a possible abnormal follow-up scenario just to offer diagnosis or service

cases.description: AI 必须按 answer_only / guided_check / service_recommended 三档判断下一步

input.message: My laser cutter leaves burrs on 2 mm stainless steel. What should I adjust first?

prompt_contains: Classify the user's current need internally as one of: answer_only, guided_check, service_recommended
answer_only: answer clearly and stop without a work order CTA
guided_check: give 2-4 practical checks and ask for the result before recommending service
service_recommended: use only when there is downtime, safety risk, formal quote, parts confirmation, on-site or remote service need, new machine selection, or an explicit service request

cases.description: 服务申请必须先摘要确认，不替用户做决定

input.message: 设备停机了，需要安排工程师上门。

prompt_contains: Before creating a service request, show a concise service-ready summary and ask the customer to confirm
Never create, claim, or imply a work order exists until the customer has confirmed and the create_work_order tool returns success
If key facts are missing, ask only the missing facts needed for triage: equipment, symptom, urgency, location/contact, and safety risk

cases.description: 中国站喷嘴清理频率：中文短答、给频率、无工单推动

input.message: 激光切割机喷嘴多久清理一次？
